findings.summary: Numeric scaling for motor/servo duty ranges and encoder polarity remain as 'Open Questions' rather than resolved contracts in the design.
The camera adapter input pixel format (BGR vs MJPG) is not explicitly contracted, though conversion to grayscale is required.

notes: The design explicitly handles the UVC 160x120 to legacy 160x128 geometry mismatch via bottom-anchoring and row duplication.
Strong guardrails are in place to prevent LS2K0300/OpenCV type leakage into legacy logic modules.
Verification completeness is high, including board-side smoke tests, parameter failure path exercises, and hardware profile mismatch checks.
The transition from an interrupt-driven dual-core model to a single-process periodic loop is well-documented with appropriate risk acknowledgment.
